Challenge
Practical Alchemy Ring

When attacking, the unit has a 50% chance to fire sparks at 1-3 nearby enemies. On hit, every second for 3 sec, sparks deal 200000 pure damage to targets and reduce their physical and magic armor by 15% for 3 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

Once in a while for 5 sec, each attack fires sparks at 2 nearby enemies.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
